# Test Fixtures

These files are sample source code used for testing the code-index parsers. They are not part of the tool itself.

Each subdirectory contains fixtures for a specific language:

- `c/` — C and C++ (hash table, string pool)
- `go/` — Go (in-memory cache)
- `markdown/` — Markdown (getting started guide)
- `python/` — Python (data pipeline)
- `r/` — R (statistics functions)
- `typescript/` — TypeScript (API client)
- `vue/` — Vue SFC (search bar component)
